sections.label: Chorus
lines: Pasian in hong kem ding a tawp dong in,
Lamdang pa le lawm hoih pen hon pa hi,
sim in Jesuh hong dawng ding hi
Na khempeuh ah muang in hong kem ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Pasian in hong kem ding a tawntungin,
Lampi hong hilh hi na kalsuan simin,
Topa hi, tuidam luan na mun ah hong kha ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Pasian in hong kem dingnuntak hun sung,
Kuamah neih loh thupha hong pia tawn tung
ciang zong nang hong kem lai ding hi
Lungnuam takin a gam hong tun ding hi.
